# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability, please report it by opening an issue or contacting the repository owner directly.

## Important Notes

- This system processes financial data locally. No portfolio data is sent to external APIs unless explicitly configured.
- API keys and credentials must never be committed to the repository.
- Use environment variables or `.env` files (gitignored) for secrets.

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported |
|---------|-----------|
| Latest  | Yes       |
